videos.title: Tour Of Krk

videos.title: Krk wine & bike
videos.description:
Ride Croatia bike tour of the Croatia's biggest island well known for its wine and cycling paths.

https://ridecroatia.com/bike-tours/island-krk
Contact us if you would like to visit an experience the Krk island.
info@ridecroatia.com

Our bike tour takes you to the most beautiful parts of the island. A route that takes you through Krk’s well known vineyards and hidden lagoons. A chance to taste the local food and wine while having a great time on a bike or e-bike. Starting from Omišalj, Krk or Malinska at 9AM our tour takes from 4-8 hours depending on the groups physical abilities and condition.

When in Rome see the pope, when on Krk try as much wine as possible. Whith a perfect climate for growing wine there are a lots of vinyeards through the whole island. The main sort is white gentle Žlahtina which we aree going to try in a local winery that will spoil us with local cheese, olives, Prosciutto and wine!


Krk is one of Croatia’s best cycling islands. Many marked cycling routs for road and MTB give a lot of options for great riding. There is even a nice cave on the route well worth a visit.
